notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Choose which notifications you want to receive and on which channel.
notifications.mandatoryDescription: You cannot disable these notifications but you can choose which channel to receive them on.

notifications.mandatoryTooltip: This notification is required and cannot be disabled.

overtime_alert.label: Overtime (100%)

schedule_change_alert.label: Shift changed or deleted

open_shift_available.label: Open shift available

shift_swap_request.description: Notification when someone requests a shift swap.
